official_functions.role: Construct, write, decode, and observe the official Play clientbound store_cookie body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns store_cookie to packet id 0x78.
The official store_cookie body is an Identifier key followed by a byte-array payload encoded by PAYLOAD_STREAM_CODEC.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, key, payload, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer runtime cookie storage policy.
